calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch (Trustor). Teri Chatfield (Propria Persona).

Terri provided a status update on her son and stated that she had questions regarding the amount of fees being charged and why the Department of Health Services was requesting fees. The matter was passed at 9:28 a.m.

At 9:55 a.m., the matter was recalled. Terri raised concerns about not receiving paperwork from Ms. Dolch, questioned the timing of terminating this trust, and the high amount of fees being charged. Mr. Der explained that the conflict of interest in answering Terri's questions over the phone was that he represents Debra he could not advise Teri as well. Furthermore, Mr. Der stated that under California Law once a special needs trust is terminated the Department of Health Services has a right to submit a claim to be reimbursed for services provided. Ms. Dolch provided a breakdown as to where the money from the trust was allocated and showed how a majority of the funds were for Brian. The Third and Final Account, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Michael Korbholz appearing for City National Bank. Fees issue addressed. Court is not going to reduce attorney's fee for responding to prior examiner's notes. Trustee's fees is reduced to adjust to advisor's fees. No change for the time being. Counsel to modify order. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
At 9:50am, Counsel returned to court with an explaination of taking fees on account. Why it was 0.75% of 100%. Order signed.
